meta.name: Verity Lens Source Reputation Registry
meta.description: Local domain reputation registry used for source metadata, badges, and trust scoring. Add more entries to the domains array to extend coverage.

domains.factCheckingHistory: Strong wire-service standards and a consistent corrections process; widely used as a baseline reference in news verification.
Associated Press maintains an established editorial workflow and is commonly cited during fact-checking reviews.
BBC reporting generally shows strong verification discipline with transparent corrections and editorial standards.
NPR usually performs well in factual reporting assessments and publishes corrections when needed.
The Guardian has a documented editorial code and a visible corrections workflow, though opinion content can be strongly framed.
The New York Times generally scores highly for factual reporting and publishes formal corrections and editor notes.
The Washington Post has a strong newsroom verification culture and formal corrections tracking.
The Wall Street Journal news desk is broadly viewed as reliable, with clear separation from opinion pages.
PBS reporting is generally stable and evidence-based, with a strong public-service editorial model.
Deutsche Welle is usually regarded as reliable international reporting with transparent sourcing.
Al Jazeera frequently provides original reporting, though regional coverage can be interpreted through geopolitical context.
USA Today is usually reliable for general reporting, though depth and framing can vary by desk.
CNN has strong breaking-news reach but has also faced criticism over framing and uneven opinion-linked coverage.
Fox News news reporting can be factual, but its broader brand often carries strong partisan framing and recurring fact-check disputes.
Newsweek still publishes useful reporting, but editorial consistency and source quality can vary significantly.
The Independent can be informative, but sensational presentation and variable sourcing lower its consistency.
This domain has a long history of unverified and conspiratorial content with poor editorial accountability.
Natural News has repeatedly been criticized for pseudoscientific and false health-related claims.
This outlet has repeatedly appeared in misinformation roundups and fact-check debunks for fabricated stories.
This domain is frequently associated with fabricated or hoax-style content that should not be treated as factual reporting.
Real Raw News has been widely debunked for publishing fabricated stories presented as real news.
This domain is known for false or satirical-style political content that is often reshared as if it were factual.
